sections.title: Using an Al Kharid leaflet on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want this! It's out of date!

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Then why would I want it? Keep moving, I have to hand all these flyers out before I get paid.

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: I don't have time to talk right now! Ali Morrisane is paying me to hand out these flyers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who is Ali Morrisane?

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Ali Morrisane is the greatest merchant in the east!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Were you paid to say that?

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Of course I was! You can find him on the north edge of town.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the flyers for?

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Well, Ali Morrisane isn't too popular with the other traders in Al Kharid, mainly because he's from Pollnivneach and they feel he has no business trading in their town.

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: I think they're just sour because he's better at making money than them.

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: The flyer advertises the different shops you can find in Al Kharid.

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: It also entitles you to money off your next purchase in any of the shops listed on it. It's Ali's way of getting on the good side of the traders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which shops?

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Here! Take one and let me get back to work.

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: I still have hundreds of these flyers to hand out, I wonder if my boss would notice if I quietly dumped them somewhere?

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Are you trying to be funny or has age turned your brain to mush? Look at the flyer you already have!

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: I'd give you a flyer but it looks like your hands are full. Come back when you have space for my flyer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is there to do round here, boy?

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: I'm very busy, so listen carefully! I shall say this only once.

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Apart from a busy and wonderous market place in Al Kharid to the south, there is the Emir's Arena to the south-east where you can challenge other players to a fight.

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: If you're here to make money, there is a mine to the south.

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Watch out for scorpions though, they'll take a pop at you if you go too near them. To avoid them just follow the western fence as you travel south.

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: If you're in the mood for a little rest and relaxation, there are a couple of nice fishing spots south of the town.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the help!

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Ali's Discount Wares...

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: The finest store in the world!

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Dommik's crafting store...

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: The place for all your crafting needs.

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Ellis' Tannery...

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: The prices are better than the smell!

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Run your enemies through in style...

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: with a Scimitar from Zeke's Superior Scimitars!

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Visit Louie's Armoured Legs Bazaar...

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Number one for clanky trousers!

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Visit Ranael's Super Skirt Store ..

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: for the most stylish protection money can buy!

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Keep west as you travel south ...

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: to avoid the killer scorpions!

lines.speaker: Ali the Leaflet Dropper
lines.text: Very well done, take this.
